title: mlos_core Optimizer config subschema

optimizer_type.description: The underlying optimizer type to use.

space_adapter_type.description: The type of space adapter to use.

space_adapter_config.$comment: stub for possible space adapter configs based on type (set using conditionals below)

$comment: Extensions to the allowed 'config' object properties when the optimizer is the mlos_core optimizer.

allOf.$comment: add extra recognized params for SMAC optimizer type

then.$comment: Not all SMAC optimizer params are exposed here, since some are handled automatically by mlos_bench.

n_random_init.description: Number of points evaluated at start to bootstrap the optimizer.

max_trials.description: Influence the budget of max number of trials for SMAC. If omitted, will default to max_suggestions.

max_ratio.description: Maximum ratio of max_trials to be random configurations to be evaluated at start to bootstrap the optimizer. Useful if you want to explicitly control the number of random configurations evaluated at start.

use_default_config.description: Whether to use the default config for the first trial.

n_random_probability.description: Probability of choosing to evaluate a random configuration during optimization.

output_directory.description: Directory to store SMAC output files.

run_name.description: Name to give for the smac output (e.g., $experimentId). If null is used, SMAC will calculate a hash based name.

allOf.$comment: a set of rules for the space adapter schema extensions

if.$comment: disallow any extra space_adapter_configs for IDENTITY/null space_adapter_type

anyOf.$comment: Match when space_adapter_type is not present

not.$comment: space_adapter_config should be omitted in this case

space_adapter_config.$comment: Properties specific to the llamatune space adapter config.

num_low_dims.description: Number of dimensions used in the low-dimensional parameter search space.
